selectedVideoModel.reason: Best current low-res production default for this pass: studio-grade lip sync for live-action/AI content at materially lower rate than Creatify Aurora 848/s, Sync 3 1053/s, Veed Fabric 1212/s, and OmniHuman 1.5 1267/s.
selectedVideoModel.cheapProofOnly: Veed Lipsync at 41/s can be used only for throwaway mouth-timing checks, not client-ready visual review.
selectedVideoModel.fallbackForMoreUGCExpression: Creatify Aurora at 848/s if Sync Lipsync 2 Pro is too stiff but the mouth sync is acceptable.

resolutionRule: Use lowest available review resolution for the first video pass. Keep 720p where available. Do not upscale until continuity, mouth visibility, lip sync, and scene order are approved.
globalLocks: Only Character A and Character B appear in the dialogue scenes.
Character A uses final-character-a-dark-taupe-20260616-220447.webp and Camera A source still (Scene 1 wide) plus locked tighter crop set for later scenes (s2-8).
Character B uses final-character-b-teal-accent-20260616-220447.webp and Camera B source still (Scene 1 wide) plus locked tighter crop set for later scenes (s2-8).
Fixed-world map: Character B is always on Bike B, the left/near bike; Character A is always on Bike A, the right/far bike.

Bike A and Bike B are the same exact sleek 2027 premium open-cockpit recumbent bike model with identical black satin aerodynamic frame, reclined black seat/backrest, compact rider-facing touchscreen console, small stabilizing bar under or near the console only if mechanically plausible, side/base handles beside the seat, vented flywheel housing, crank/pedal placement, foot straps, rail/base construction, and mechanical proportions.
The front cockpit stays open with room for natural hand movement; do not add large upright-style handlebars or a bulky handlebar tower in front of the riders.
The bikes must make logical mechanical sense and never change style, console, frame, pedals, crank path, seat, side/base handles, flywheel housing, or open-front cockpit from frame to frame.

Each rider's left foot and right foot must stay on the correct left/right pedals of her own assigned bike with no crossed legs, no foot crossing the bike centerline, no foot on the opposite-side pedal, and no left/right pedal confusion.
Character A stays on Character A's assigned recumbent bike and same seat/side in every scene.
Character B stays on Character B's assigned recumbent bike and same seat/side in every scene.
No seat swaps, bike swaps, side swaps, trading places, repositioning, outfit changes, hair changes, face changes, or gym layout changes. Only the camera angle changes.
Hands and gestures stay below the face line and away from the mouth.
Shot progression: S1 stays on wide opener; S2-S8 use progressively tighter framed versions of the same Camera A/B source geometry with no character, bike, or wardrobe changes.
ctaRule: Do not render the CTA as a bike talking shot for final. Use the Meal Prep Revolution website screenshot/end-card hold and place Character B CTA audio over it.

scenes.speaker: Character A
scenes.dialogue: Okay, seriously... you look amazing. What's your secret?
scenes.prompt: Use the fresh locked Camera A bike-plate source still exactly: camera-a-bike-plate-source-still-20260617-031702.png. Character A is the only active speaker. Character A keeps the exact same face, brunette ponytail, darker mocha/taupe high-end logo-free athleisure, makeup, body type, and assigned bike/seat/side. Character B appears only as a blurred blonde shoulder/hair foreground shape; Character B's face and mouth are not visible. Both recumbent bikes remain side-by-side, parallel, facing the same direction. Character A turns naturally toward Character B, not toward the camera. Dialogue: "Okay, seriously... you look amazing. What's your secret?" Natural curious friend energy. Continuous visible pedaling by both women, subtle shoulder rhythm, tiny below-face hand gesture if needed. Face, eyes, and mouth fully visible. Hands never cover mouth, chin, cheeks, jawline, or face tracking area. Locked camera. No zoom. No pan. No direct-to-camera presenter energy. Perfect lip sync is the priority. Maintain the same 2027 open-cockpit recumbent bike model from the bike prop plate; no bike drift, no seat swap, no console changes.
